plan.description: Analyze code and create implementation plans without making changes

tdd.description: Test-driven implementation with full tool access

review.description: Code review for quality, security, and Go best practices

test.template: Run `make test` and analyze the results. If there are failures, explain the issues and suggest fixes.

lint.template: Run `make lint` and fix any issues found. Explain what was wrong and how you fixed it.

build.template: Run `make build` and verify the binary works with `./cloud-janitor version`.
